message:
feat(core): add runtime budget enforcement with policy constraints and recovery (ft-2p9cb.1.3.1)

MitigationLevel enum with strict ordering (None→Defer→Degrade→Shed→Skip).
PolicyConstraint per-stage rules: max mitigation level, critical flag, warmup.
RecoveryProtocol: gradual de-escalation after cooldown observations or timeout.
RuntimeEnforcer: deterministic enforcement with policy clamping, warmup suppression,
escalation tracking, and structured decision logging. 21 new tests (144 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
